message:
test(proptest): add 31 property tests for connector_bundles + fix unused import warning

- proptest_connector_bundles.rs: serde roundtrips, behavioral invariants for
  BundleTier, BundleCategory, ConnectorBundle, IngestionOutcome, BundleRegistry, etc.
- Fix unused ConnectorActionKind import in connector_testbed (move to test module)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
